args.title: Image Gallery
args.css: .thumbnail { transition: all 0.2s; border: 2px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; } .thumbnail:hover { border-color: #6366f1; } .thumbnail.active { border-color: #6366f1; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(99,102,241,0.3); }
args.html:
Click Open Folder to browse
0 images
🖼️
Select a folder to browse images
Use ← → or click thumbnails
No image selected
args.script:
let images = []; let currentIndex = -1; const thumbnails = document.getElementById('thumbnails'); const preview = document.getElementById('preview'); const placeholder = document.getElementById('placeholder'); const filename = document.getElementById('filename'); const prevBtn = document.getElementById('prev'); const nextBtn = document.getElementById('next'); const countEl = document.getElementById('image-count'); const openBtn = document.getElementById('openBtn'); window.selectImage = function(index) { if (index < 0 || index >= images.length) return; currentIndex = index; const img = images[index]; preview.src = 'local-file://' + img.path; preview.classList.remove('hidden'); placeholder.classList.add('hidden'); filename.textContent = img.name; document.querySelectorAll('.thumbnail').forEach((el, i) => el.classList.toggle('active', i === index)); prevBtn.disabled = index === 0; nextBtn.disabled = index === images.length - 1; const thumb = document.querySelector('.thumbnail[data-index="' + index + '"]'); if (thumb) thumb.scrollIntoView({ block: 'nearest' }); }; async function loadFolder() { try { const result = await stuard.pickFolder({ title: 'Select Image Folder' }); if (result.canceled || !result.filePaths || !result.filePaths[0]) return; const folder = result.filePaths[0]; openBtn.textContent = 'Loading...'; openBtn.disabled = true; const scanResult = await stuard.callTool('run_python_script', { code: `import os, json; folder = ${JSON.stringify(folder)}; exts = {'.jpg','.jpeg','.png','.gif','.webp','.bmp','.svg'}; imgs = [{'name': f, 'path': os.path.join(folder, f).replace(chr(92), '/')} for f in sorted(os.listdir(folder)) if os.path.splitext(f.lower())[1] in exts]; print(json.dumps(imgs))` }); openBtn.textContent = 'Open Folder'; openBtn.disabled = false; if (scanResult.ok && scanResult.stdout) { images = JSON.parse(scanResult.stdout); countEl.textContent = images.length + ' images'; let html = ''; images.forEach((img, i) => { html += '
'; }); thumbnails.innerHTML = html || '
No images found
'; if (images.length > 0) selectImage(0); } } catch(e) { console.error('Load error:', e); openBtn.textContent = 'Open Folder'; openBtn.disabled = false; } } openBtn.addEventListener('click', loadFolder); prevBtn.addEventListener('click', () => selectImage(currentIndex - 1)); nextBtn.addEventListener('click', () => selectImage(currentIndex + 1)); document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => { if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') selectImage(currentIndex - 1); if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') selectImage(currentIndex + 1); if (e.key === 'Escape') stuard.close(); if (e.key === 'Home') selectImage(0); if (e.key === 'End') selectImage(images.length - 1); });
